_note: Sprite bake recipe (W11). Coordinates + palette-row indices ONLY -- contains no Dwarf Fortress artwork. host/bake_sprites.mjs replays these ops against the HOST'S OWN DF install to produce the web client's composite sprites. op forms: ['b', srcIdx, sx, sy, w, h, dx, dy, remapIdx] alpha-composites a crop of sources[srcIdx] (remapIdx>=0: recolor pixels matching remaps[i].palette row 'from' to row 'to' first); ['fill', r, g, b, a]; ['o', outputName, scale, dx, dy] composites an already-baked output at integer scale; ['clear', [[x,y],...]] makes pixels transparent. Generated by tools/ws2/emit_sprite_recipe.py.
